note: Every future Tier-A adapter. An entry is STALE until it carries a rebase_ack for each completed parent whose prescription_digest matches the generated ADAPTER_REBASE_MATRIX. Acks are added by whoever actually rebases the adapter, never by the generator: that is what makes silent methodology drift detectable. GRAVITY_METHOD_V2: upward bracketing is permanently forbidden; every adapter must name the atlas entry it avoids and the materially new family it begins with.
